---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help us improve teb
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Description

A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Step one
2. Step two
3. ...

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages or screenshots if applicable.

## Environment

- **OS:** (e.g., Ubuntu 22.04, macOS 14)
- **Python version:** (e.g., 3.12.1)
- **teb version / commit:** (e.g., 0.1.0 or commit SHA)
- **AI provider:** (e.g., Anthropic, OpenAI, template mode)
- **Docker:** (yes/no, version if applicable)

## Additional Context

Any other information that might help diagnose the issue.
